programs.programName: SHINE (Serving Health Insurance Needs of Elders)

verified.notes: SHINE is a counseling and assistance program, not a benefits program with eligibility criteria. No age, income, or asset limits apply. The search results do not contain a centralized main phone number for applications or general help. Contact information directs users to submit a form to connect with a local SHINE Counselor, or to call the Elder Helpline (1-800-262-2243) specifically for Medicare fraud concerns. The official SHINE website (floridashine.org) and Department of Elder Affairs (4040 Esplanade Way, Suite 270, Tallahassee, FL 32399-7000) are the authoritative sources, but a single main phone number for general SHINE inquiries is not provided in the available search results.
